question.label: Recognition landing
question.name: Did the recognition for the refactor feel right for you?
question.description: Explores if the recognition for the refactor was satisfying.

answer: Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.

assessment.note: Priya feels the recognition was minimal and context-switching on reviews is adding up — signals engagement strain.

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
